markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, workflow, and future planning.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** When articles position a feature as a "best practice," they must either confirm you.com offers it or link to documentation to avoid credibility gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Workflow Fixes:** GrowthX will create an Airtable interface for Brooke to update article statuses directly, unblocking the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Planning Rescheduled:** The 2026 planning session is moved to the week of Jan 26 to allow new Head of Brand & Product Marketing Matt Taylor to onboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [**New Tool Preview:** GrowthX will demo its new AI visibility tracker next week, a free tool designed for B2B buying categories to replace tools like Brandlight.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: Feature Mentions

  - [**Problem:** An article positioned "field filtering" as a key feature for "best tools," but it was unclear if you.com offers it, creating a potential credibility gap.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Solution:** Establish clear rules for feature mentions:](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
      - [**If positioned as a "best practice":**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
          - [Confirm you.com offers the feature.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
          - [Link directly to the relevant documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Future Idea:** A glossary of technical terms could capture traffic and serve as a central linking resource.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Workflow & Process Improvements

  - [**Airtable Status Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Problem:** Brooke cannot edit article statuses in Airtable, forcing inefficient Slack updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Solution:** Bailey will create an Airtable interface for Brooke to update statuses directly.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**"Composable API" Article Revision:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Problem:** An SME (API person) noted the article should be about "composable architecture," not "API," requiring a significant rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Solution:** Brooke will manage the revision with the SME and provide GrowthX with both the original article (with SME comments) and the final draft.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows GrowthX to capture foundational feedback for future content without Brooke creating extra work.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Image Creation:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Decision:** you.com's design team will now create all article images.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is for internal brand control, not a quality issue with GrowthX's images.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will continue providing images as a backup, but Brooke will replace them with the new designs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Future Planning & New Tools

  - [**2026 Planning Session:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Rescheduled:** Moved to the week of Jan 26 (1-hour meeting).](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To allow new Head of Brand & Product Marketing Matt Taylor to onboard and contribute.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [**Attendees:** Brooke, Matt Taylor, Justin, and Marcus.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [**GrowthX AI Visibility Tracker:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Announcement:** GrowthX is developing a new platform to track brand visibility in AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Built to solve frustrations with existing tools (e.g., Brandlight, Scrunch) by focusing on B2B buying categories and providing 90 days of historical data on new prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Access:** Included free as part of the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [**Demo:** Bailey hopes to demo the platform next week, pending product team approval.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Update editor on new feature mention guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Create and share the Airtable interface for status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Confirm if the AI tracker demo can happen next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
      - [Reschedule the 2026 planning session for the week of Jan 26.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [Manage the "Composable API" article revision with the SME.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with the commented original and final draft.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Invite Matt Taylor to the 2026 planning session.](https://fathom.video/share/Gya-HqVW3kZDvedenAxhhFN9FHFbyr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
